_instructions: Only 'connection' and 'project' are required. All other fields are optional — fill in only what you need.

project._note: Your numeric Jira project ID. Find in any project URL: ?projectId=<numeric-id>&projectKey=<KEY>

xlsxImport._note: Defaults for scripts/import-xlsx-to-qmetry.py. CLI flags override these. componentIds = default components attached to every imported case; leave [] for none.

executionResultIds._note: Required only for update_test_execution and bulk_update_test_executions. Verify IDs match your QMetry instance.

optionalFields._note: Fill in only the fields you actually use.
